flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cowley County Community College rose 40% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.4k → $4.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cowley County Community College fell 31% between 2006 and 2009 (33.7% → 23.4%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cowley County Community College rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.2k → $6.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cowley County Community College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8k → 1.5k).
